pages/workbench.source:
<!-- The workbench page mounts the full shell island, passing the SSR-resolved
     discovery data (cases + problems) and the preview origin as inputs. -->
<workbench [cases]="cases" [problems]="problems" [previewBase]="previewBase"></workbench>
